name: Donald J. Trump
subject: The Clock Is Ticking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
---
| | [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhuhjlt-kujulhlke-y/) **Peter,** **We are under a month away from Election Day and it is just as important to win in November as it was to win in 2016.** I need you to get in the fight today and **[donate to help Mike Braun](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhuhjlt-kujulhlke-j/)**. If we want to make America great again and keep it great, we need leaders in Washington like Mike Braun who will fight to keep America winning, create jobs and keep them here, and protect our conservative values. We’re tired of the lazy, do-nothing, losing attitude of Sleepin’ Joe Donnelly. He doesn’t share your values AND he ships jobs to Mexico! **He fits in with the Washington swamp, but it’s time to send him packing and tell his pals Chuck and Nancy that we won’t allow them to turn back the clock on our successes!** [Joe has to go. Donate to Mike today.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhuhjlt-kujulhlke-t/) It’s so critical that we prevent the liberals from taking over in Washington and undoing everything we’ve accomplished so far. And make no mistake, that is what they want to do. They will open the border, raise taxes, and weaken our military if we let them. We have to fight back by electing Mike Braun! I know that Mike is the right guy for the job. He is a real patriot who loves America and fights for the values that make us strong. He will support our military, secure our borders, protect our neighborhoods, and work hard for Hoosiers! **I need you to[donate TODAY](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhuhjlt-kujulhlke-i/) and make sure that we keep the Senate in Republican hands so that we can keep making America great again.** The truth is, it costs a lot of money to run campaigns – **[it’s impossible to win this election without your support.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhuhjlt-kujulhlke-d/)** Mike isn’t running to get rich or have power. Believe me! **He’s running to protect Hoosier values and make America great again.** **[I need you to give a generous donation of $2,700 (max), $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $25 to win in November.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjhuhjlt-kujulhlke-h/)** Every little bit counts! **The clock is ticking - I'm counting on you!** Thank you,
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States |

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends, our match expires tonight at midnight, but right now we're falling short of our goal - and I need your help.

Mitch McConnell is dumping $22 million into Nevada - and we know the GOP is willing to spend whatever it takes to defeat us. **The truth is, we _cannot_ beat the GOP, flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate for Democrats unless we hit our goal tonight.
**
A recent poll shows us down by 1 point - and _POLITICO_ says that Democrats have "almost no shot" to take back the Senate if we lose in Nevada. **A generous group of supporters is MATCHING every gift today (but only until midnight!), so I need you to step up.
****

-_Washington Examiner_ “The Trump administration’s often overlooked list of achievements has surpassed those of former President Ronald Reagan at this time and more than doubled since the last tally of accomplishments after his first year in office,” Paul Bedard writes. As the President nears the two-year mark of his first term, “the administration has counted up 289 accomplishments in 18 categories, capped by the confirmation of Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.”
##
[**Trump Secures Pastor Brunson's Release**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://townhall.com/tipsheet/cortneyobrien/2018/10/12/trump-secures-pastor-brunsons-release-n2527890) -_Townhall_ “The president chose all caps for his latest message - pretty justifiably,” Cortney O’Brien reports. “PASTOR BRUNSON JUST RELEASED. WILL BE HOME SOON!” President Trump tweeted. American Pastor Andrew Brunson “is being released from house arrest after two years and it seems he'll be coming home. President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence were instrumental in the good news,” O’Brien adds.
##
[**Trump Says Hurricane Michael Brought Destruction ‘Not Seen in a Long Time’**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/11/trump-destruction-hurricane-michael-not-seen-long/) -_The Washington Times_ “President Trump said Hurricane Michael packed ‘tremendous power’ on its destructive path through Florida and Georgia, but fortunately is moving quickly so emergency crews can begin their work,” Dave Boyer reports. The President “said the Federal Emergency Management Agency, state authorities and electric company crews have already moved in to repair damage and help those left homeless.” **Watch** : [**President Trump’s message on Hurricane Michael**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1050848286565851136) [**For Trump and Kanye West, Oval Office Visit Becomes Mutual Admiration Society**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/10/11/for-trump-and-kanye-west-oval-office-visit-becomes-mutual-admiration-society/) -_The Daily Signal_ Joined by pro football Hall of Fame running back Jim Brown, rapper Kanye West had a slate of agenda items to discuss with President Trump in his Oval Office visit this week, Fred Lucas reports. They included “urban revitalization, new workforce training programs, more manufacturing jobs, tax incentives to open businesses in underserved communities through the Opportunity Zone program, and crime in Chicago.” [**Justice Kavanaugh Could Have Big Impact Early On Supreme Court**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/8/brett-kavanaugh-could-have-big-impact-early-on-sup/) -_The Washington Times_ Justice Brett M. Kavanaugh, who was ceremonially sworn in as America’s 114th Supreme Court Justice at a White House ceremony on Monday, heard “oral arguments at the high court for the first time Tuesday in cases dealing with criminal matters where his vote is expected to have a big impact,” Alex Swoyer reports. Kavanaugh takes the seat of retired Justice Anthony Kennedy, who was appointed by President Reagan. **In case you missed it:**[**Highlights from Justice Kavanaugh’s swearing-in** ](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/scotus/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) [**Trump Signs Landmark Music Bill Into Law**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.rollingstone.com/music/music-news/trump-signs-music-modernization-act-736185/) -_Rolling Stone_ “President Trump signed the eagerly anticipated Music Modernization Act into law at a ceremony at the White House on Thursday, in the most high-profile event for the music industry in several years,” Amy X. Wang writes in _Rolling Stone_. The MMA will close copyright loopholes and thus help songwriters get paid. “They were treated very unfairly. They’re not going to be treated unfairly anymore,” President Trump said. [**Trump Signs Legislation to Clean Up Millions of Tons of Garbage from the World’s Oceans**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://dailycaller.com/2018/10/11/trump-signs-bill-clean-ocean/?utm_source=Twitter&utm_medium=Social&utm_campaign=atdailycaller&__twitter_impression=true&__twitter_impression=true) -_The Daily Caller_ “President Donald Trump added his signature to the ‘Save Our Seas Act’ on Thursday, green-lighting an initiative to clean up eight million tons of debris from the planet’s oceans,” Jason Hopkins reports. “As president I will continue to do everything I can to stop other nations from making our oceans into their landfills,” President Trump said. [**Trump Signs Bills Banning Pharmacy ‘Gag Clauses’**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&109&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/policy/healthcare/trump-signs-bills-banning-pharmacy-gag-clauses) -_Washington Examiner_ “President Trump has signed two bills into law to block insurers from enforcing ‘gag clauses’ that forbid pharmacies from telling customers about how they can pay less for drugs,” Kimberly Leonard reports. Americans deserve to know the lowest prices available at pharmacies—“and now that is what they are getting,” the President said. [**Trump Says US Stepping Up Fight Against Human Trafficking**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&110&&&https://www.apnews.com/0ee46272e3b642768509e3e45c6a4bc8) -_The Associated Press_ “The U.S. is stepping up the fight against human trafficking until it can be stamped out ‘once and for all,’ President Donald Trump said Thursday, calling for an end to ‘modern slavery,’” _The Associated Press_ reports. President Trump spoke at the annual meeting of the Interagency Task Force to Monitor and Combat Trafficking in Persons, which was held at the White House this week. **************Watch** : [**“Together we will end modern slavery,” Ivanka Trump says.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&111&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FQBgFir8Zxo)
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&112&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&113&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDEzLjk2MTg3MzQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxMy45NjE4NzM0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAwMTU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&114&&&http://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/new?preferences=true)

Hi,

The President has made it very clear he's targeting Minnesota in this election -- in fact his most recent trip was just over a week ago.

But in less than a month, Minnesotans will have the opportunity to answer all the chaos and negativity with their votes.

So remember what I've been saying all year: **We can 't pull the blankets over our heads and hit the snooze button on this election year. We've got to get out there and _win_.**

That's why we're setting a goal of raising $40,000 before our final mid-month deadline of the election.

Hitting this goal is how we'll show Washington (and everyone else watching when our next finance report becomes public) that we're ready to find common ground, break through the bickering, and get results.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This new climate report is SERIOUS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
If there were ever a time for climate action, it's RIGHT NOW.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7baaa/2f5ea88d/748c3495/2cbc6533/4004948790/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema") Friend, According to the United Nations this week, if we don't drastically amp up our efforts to curtail climate change right now, we are in huge, irreversible trouble. Friend, this new report from the United Nations' climate science group, IPCC, must be taken seriously. We have just 12 years to limit the most devastating effects of global warming, _**or we will see its most extreme effects in our lifetimes.**_ [**If we don't cut back emissions by 2030, we are in serious trouble. We need to take action RIGHT NOW to make it happen, and that means putting pressure on our politicians to act. Our action -- or inaction -- will shape the future of our planet. Sign our petition right now to demand climate action!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7baaa/2f5ea88d/748c3495/2cbc6533/4004948790/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema") | [TELL TRUMP: ACT ON CLIMATE!](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7baaa/2f5ea88d/748c3495/2cbc6533/4004948790/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema")
---
This report gives fresh urgency to our fight to reduce carbon pollution and transition away from fossil fuels. We can defeat climate change because we have the tools. We can build a more sustainable energy future and create good-paying jobs in growing cleantech industries. But we need to get to work. Now.
If our greenhouse gas emissions continue at the current rate, we'll see warming by as much as 2.7 degrees Fahrenheit (1.5 degrees Celsius) above pre-industrial levels by 2040.
The result? Food shortages and drought, wildfires and floods, and a mass die-off of coral reefs as soon as 2040. Fifty million people across the world, from Bangladesh to Egypt, India to Japan, to right here in the United States, will suffer from increased coastal flooding. People will lose their homes, their streets, their livelihoods to rising sea levels. Millions of people displaced from sea levels rising. Extreme heat making whole areas uninhabitable. Countless species gone forever.
**From the environment to the economy, the global impact of rising temperatures will be huge and we are already beginning to see its effects. That's why we need bold solutions and bold leadership from our political leaders, not denial and inaction.**
As Donald Trump and the other politicians in Washington D.C. refuse to act, in the midst of ever-increasing destructive weather caused by rising temperatures, I will step up and continue to lead by example. I won't back down from this challenge. It's too important to me, to our children, and to our future, and I hope you'll be right by my side.
[**Will you add your name to mine now, to demand climate action?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7baaa/2f5ea88d/748c3495/2cbc6533/4004948790/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema")
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7baaa/2f5ea88d/748c3495/2cbc6533/4004948790/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&source=ema_2018-10-12_mid-month-1&utm_campaign=mid-month-1&utm_medium=ema")
---
This report makes it crystal clear: It's time to act -- before it's too late.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

body:
Several weeks ago, I had the pleasure of spending some time with fellow women candidates who are ready to serve their country again, and I would like to introduce you to them, too.
| | Peter, Service has always been a defining value in my life. From a young age, my father taught me to value service to country, which inspired me to join the CIA. It was this same value that motivated me to run for Congress when I saw our congressman put partisan politics over Virginia families. **And I am not the only first-time candidate for office this year with a history of serving our country, Peter.** There are candidates with national security and military backgrounds running inspiring campaigns across the country -- many of them women like me. Several weeks ago, I had the pleasure of spending some time with fellow women candidates who are ready to serve their country again, **and I would like to introduce you to them, too.** We filmed [**the short video below,**](https://act.myngp.com/el/P-uFGJPC6KHH1dCm21J6diTG0yR15pMCvx3L2QCNuzI=/PNVdq-z5RQ3dXqVNFW8H3fJr3l3yw4Et7v9cKUYxmDY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.13_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) sharing our stories of service and why we are now signing up to serve again. Our service did not come with an expiration date, and we are ready to serve our country and help American families again! [**I hope you will watch our video -- and then chip in to help me flip VA-7, if you can!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/P-uFGJPC6KHH1dCm21J6diTG0yR15pMCvx3L2QCNuzI=/PNVdq-z5RQ3dXqVNFW8H3fJr3l3yw4Et7v9cKUYxmDY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.13_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/P-uFGJPC6KHH1dCm21J6diTG0yR15pMCvx3L2QCNuzI=/PNVdq-z5RQ3dXqVNFW8H3fJr3l3yw4Et7v9cKUYxmDY=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.13_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/P-uFGJPC6KHH1dCm21J6diTG0yR15pMCvx3L2QCNuzI=/ykuTXq2gm-zRHna78wUrrpQG8t5t6RkZOtsnBMNZeQk=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. body:
Maryland needs better.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788cc/7ab0e2c4/7e1dbcbc/34980320/2931388570/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10138A") Friend, Climate action is on the ballot this November. As Maryland continues to face smoggy summers, litter and debris flowing into the Chesapeake Bay, and the threat of dangerous climate disruption, we cannot accept anything short of immediate climate action. This November, Marylanders can either elect a climate champion who will put the state on the path to 100% clean energy, or someone who fails to enact the bold action needed. This November, Maryland should make Ben Jealous its next governor. **On behalf of our 70,000 members and supporters in Maryland, we here at the Sierra Club are thrilled to endorse environmental champion Ben Jealous in Maryland's 2018 gubernatorial election.** [**Donations made to Ben Jealous in the next 48 hours will be MATCHED, up to a total of $4,000. Will you join us in supporting his campaign with a donation of $5 or more now?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788cc/7ab0e2c4/7e1dbcbc/34980320/2931388570/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10138A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788cc/7ab0e2c4/7e1dbcbc/34980323/2931388570/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10138A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

As governor, Ben has pledged to change the way Maryland confronts climate change with a real, concrete plan to bring green jobs to Maryland. Ben knows that rhetoric alone cannot solve the climate crisis and protect Marylanders. It's why he's put forth a plan to transition the state to 100% clean, renewable energy which will provide 21st-century jobs for the Maryland economy. Ben will end the system that saddles the communities with the fewest resources with the most pollution. And Ben will integrate environmental justice policies that ensure every Marylander has the same access to clean air and water.
Larry Hogan has failed to live up to the environmental champion he promised to be. The last four years have been marked by delays and half measures. Hogan vetoed The Maryland Clean Energy Jobs Act in 2016, and this year, he granted a permit to the fracked-gas Potomac Pipeline. This isn't climate action.
**We know which side Larry Hogan is on, and it's not ours.** [**Maryland needs a clean energy champion; Maryland needs Ben Jealous. If you agree, join the Sierra Club to show your support with a donation of $5 or more right now. Remember: Donations made to Ben Jealous in the next 48 hours will be MATCHED, up to a total of $4,000!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3788cc/7ab0e2c4/7e1dbcbc/34980320/2931388570/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-sierra-club?refcode=OHQ10138A")
Thanks,
Mike

name: Jessalyn Reid, Kaine for Virginia
subject: MEMO: Get Out the Vote Fund being used in the field (new strategy)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c35/3407371624/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND")

| | Derek:

By the numbers, talking to and registering new voters is one of the best ways our team on the ground can use their time. Per hour it translates to more votes than say, phone calls (which are still very important, too!!).

So our team is doing just that this weekend: **Going out into every corner of Virginia to make sure folks know how to register and how to vote. Our team needs to put $50,000 towards this effort before the voter registration deadline on Monday. This $50,000 will keep our field team on the ground and make sure they have all the resources they need.**

[Will you help us fill this fund to make sure our volunteers have the clipboards, pens, and all the data and informational materials they need to pull off this major weekend?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c34/3407371624/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+help+us+fill+this+fund+to+make+&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND")

We've also just launched [TimKaine.com/Vote](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c0b/3407371624/VEsF/ "https://timkaine.com/vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+TimKainecomVote&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND") (!) which will provide Virginians with all of the information they need to confidently head to the ballot box. When it comes to voting, there are no bad questions, and our team will be on standby to handle individual questions as well.

**But to build and sustain programs like this, we need resources to keep the lights on. Derek, it 's really important that you contribute to the Get Out the Vote Fund, but I'd like to give you some options on how you can do that:**
* 1\. Can't get out there yourself, but know the value of volunteering? [Donate $5 here to make sure our volunteers this weekend have the clipboards and pens they need to spend the whole day outside talking to voters.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c0a/3407371624/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Donate+5+here+to+make+sure+our+volunteer&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND")

* 2\. Want more people to see TimKaine.com/Vote and want to make sure people get individualized help if they need it? (Us too!). [Donate $50 here to help us expand our voting information materials and response team.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c09/3407371624/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Donate+50+here+to+help+us+expand+our+vot&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND")

* 3\. Ready for Democrats to win in Virginia on November 6th? [Make a $100 investment to our field team so we can keep staff on the ground while our team mobilizes new and lifelong Democrats alike for Tim Kaine and all 11 House candidates in this final month.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c08/3407371624/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Make+a+100+investment+to+our+field+team+&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND")

* 4\. Have another amount you can spare today? [Contribute any amount you feel comfortable with here and we will route it to the department or program most in need.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c0f/3407371624/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Contribute+any+amount+you+feel+comfortab&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND")

We only have two days to raise this money, but if everyone chips in a little, I know we can raise $21,091 more and fully fund this program by the deadline.

**If you can 't pitch in today, there are other ways you can help: Forward [TimKaine.com/Vote](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c0e/3407371624/VEsO/ "https://timkaine.com/vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+TimKainecomVote&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND") to friends or post it on your social media, and [sign up here to volunteer](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c0d/3407371624/VEsP/ "https://timkaine.com/events?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+sign+up+here+to+volunteer&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND") wherever you are.**

Donating here has a direct benefit which we will all (_hopefully!!_) see on Election Night if we can flip critical Virginia seats in the House and re-elect Tim Kaine:

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Get-Out-the-Vote-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1001/3e0906/764a0a7b/3e379c0c/3407371624/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGetOuttheVoteFund&utm_campaign=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND&source=20181013_1_FR_JR_money-allocation-LDND")

Thanks for reading!

_Jessalyn Reid_
Digital Director

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Brian Kemp's office has put a hold on processing 53,000 registrations. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8e2/34a064cc/e1b65bd/70d36e0/4225511598/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - By now, you've probably heard the news: [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8e2/34a064cc/e1b65bd/70d36e1/4225511598/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101318-full") Brian Kemp's office has put a hold on processing 53,000 registrations, most of them from Black Georgians. Let's be clear, this isn't incompetence - it's deliberate malpractice. He knows Stacey's message of creating jobs, investing in public education, and increasing access to health care is resonating with voters. He's seen the polls: Our race is a dead heat! And that's exactly why Kemp's office is resorting to these dirty tricks now, with just **24 days** left before Election Day. Voting early is one way to fight back. The other is helping ensure we can fully fund our voter protection hotline. Protecting the vote isn't cheap, but it is worth it. Our attorneys are standing by to ensure every eligible voter can cast a ballot - IF we can get this operation fully funded. **[Make a $3 donation to our Voter Protection Fund right away to help our team fight back against Kemp's attempts to suppress the vote >>](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8e2/34a064cc/e1b65bd/70d36e1/4225511598/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDEzMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-voterprotectionfund?refcode=IE101318-full")** Thank you for doing your part to protect the vote. \- Team Abrams

Peter, Democrats have proven that we're the party of meaningful healthcare reform.

Thanks to the Affordable Care Act, millions of Americans -- from Sacramento to Staten Island, from San Diego to San Antonio -- were given unprecedented levels of access to health care. For the first time, no one could lose or be denied coverage due to a pre-existing condition.

But the Trump administration is trying to push healthcare plans that endanger pre-existing conditions coverage, and Republicans in Washington just this week voted down a Democratic effort to stop it.

**[Stand with me and support covering all Americans with pre-existing conditions.](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036682/4ac3d62d/6a104adf/1ce290fc/2686217181/VEsE/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181013_healthcare?source=RTW_181013_Healthcare_EM")** | | ******[ADD YOUR NAME](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036682/4ac3d62d/6a104adf/1ce290fc/2686217181/VEsF/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181013_healthcare?source=RTW_181013_Healthcare_EM")******

Republicans have tried and failed multiple times to repeal the Affordable Care Act. So now, they're just trying to go around it. The Trump administration is trying to sell "junk insurance" plans, which bypass protections put in place by the ACA and allow insurance companies to discriminate against people with pre-existing conditions.

So what did Republicans in Washington do? They callously blocked our attempts to protect the nearly 130 million Americans with pre-existing conditions.

The difference between the parties on this issue is as clear as night and day, and we're going to make sure the American people know that difference.

**[Sign your name to stand with Democrats in Congress as we fight for those with pre-existing conditions>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036682/4ac3d62d/6a104adf/1ce290fc/2686217181/VEsC/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181013_healthcare?source=RTW_181013_Healthcare_EM")**

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Our nation will look to Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I’m proud -- and excited! -- to be back in Texas, fighting the good fight
for my friend Beto.

After spending time with Beto and thousands of fired-up Texans in Corpus
Christi, Harlingen and McAllen, it’s never been more clear to me: Beto is
the senator that Texas deserves.

[1]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181013&t=1019&akid=17939%2E444211%2EM54O48 ]That’s why I’m writing to you today: I’m calling on you to dig deep
and support Beto’s campaign. Every dollar goes towards powering this
campaign to victory on November 6.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181013&t=1020&akid=17939%2E444211%2EM54O48 ]Contribute
$3
»

Texas is near and dear to my heart. I’ll never forget barnstorming the
state with my uncle, Senator Ted Kennedy, campaigning for Barack Obama in
2008. We finished up late one night at a hall in Laredo, with only a
handful of voters left to meet with us. Uncle Teddy didn’t blink. Without
missing a beat, he got behind the mic, raised his hands, and belted out
“Ay Jalisco No Te Rajes” in his booming Boston accent. The crowd went
crazy for the old ranchero song and the Massachusetts mariachi who sang
it.

As we march forward, our nation will look to Texas. But this isn’t going
to be an easy one to win: Beto’s not just up against Ted Cruz: he’s up
against at least eleven outside groups that are spending big to tip the
scales.

It’s a challenge, for sure -- but it’s a challenge Texans have met
head-on. I’ve seen so many impassioned volunteers and incredible
supporters working around the clock to help get Beto to the Senate.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/10792?refcode=em20181013&t=1021&akid=17939%2E444211%2EM54O48 ]Can you help Beto fight back against the super PAC attacks coming his
way with a
$3
contribution today?

With your support, I know Beto can win on November 6.

Joe

body:
In what one journalist is calling "one of the strangest stories I have ever reported on," our campaign was the target of a ridiculous, unethical stunt this week.
[](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.13_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=39.68&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Team, we told you that the far-right was desperate to unseat Tom. **Well, it turns out that they 're even more desperate than we thought. **Because, in what one journalist is calling "one of the strangest stories I have ever reported on," our campaign was the target of a **ridiculous, unethical, and illegal act** this week. Now, stay with us for a minute -- **because this is a long story, and it gets weird.** Here's what happened: Two young men walked into our campaign office, said they were supporters of Tom, and offered to donate **$39.68** to our campaign. _**Sounds normal enough, right?**_ Well, when our staff asked them to fill out donation paperwork -- and this is where it gets weird -- they acted strangely and wrote that they were members of a local chapter of the Communist Party. As it turned out, these two young men were NOT supporters of Tom. At least one was a staffer for the Arizona Republican Party -- and they wanted to give our campaign those **$39.68** in an apparent attempt to smear Tom and accuse him of having Communist sympathies! This was a dirty, illegal trick, **and it proves how absolutely desperate and determined the Republicans are to unseat Tom in November.** These sorts of dirty tricks have no place in our politics, team -- and our campaign is going to win this race without them. **And YOU can help us do it.** [**Can you make a donation of $39.68 -- yes, $39.68 -- right now to help us fight back against the far-right and their dirty tricks?**](http://action.tomohalleran.
